extracted_items.content: Analytics service database: ClickHouse (columnar storage, purpose-built for analytics). PostgreSQL was considered but rejected in favor of ClickHouse for better aggregation performance on analytics workloads.
Event streaming for analytics pipeline: Redpanda (Kafka-compatible, single binary, no Zookeeper dependency). Selected over Apache Kafka for operational simplicity.
Analytics dashboard: Grafana, using the Grafana ClickHouse plugin as data source. Leveraging existing Grafana infrastructure for infrastructure metrics.

Analytics stack architecture: Redpanda (event streaming) → ClickHouse (columnar analytics storage) → Grafana (dashboard/visualization). Designed for a few thousand queries per day with complex aggregations.
